# LoansForFreelancers

> LoansForFreelancers (loansforfreelancers.com) — Matches freelancers and gig workers with licensed specialists who qualify them on 1099 totals or 12–24 months of deposits (platform payouts included) for purchases, cash-out refinancing, and HELOCs/HELOANs. LoansForFreelancers is an AdaptLend service (adaptlend.com) and is not a lender.

## Key facts

- Freelancers qualify on 1099 totals (~90% of gross) or 12–24 months of deposits; platform payouts (Upwork, Stripe, PayPal) count in deposit-based programs.
- Variable income is averaged over 12–24 months — lumpy months are normal, not disqualifying.
- Cash-out refinancing and HELOCs/HELOANs are available without W-2s or tax returns.
- 12 months of freelancing can be enough with prior W-2 history in the same field.
- Filling out the form does not affect credit; a credit check only happens if the borrower moves forward with a specialist.

## How it works

1. Answer a few plain-English questions (about two minutes, no credit check).
2. LoansForFreelancers matches the borrower with a licensed specialist for this exact situation.
3. The specialist contacts the borrower within one business day; the match also arrives by email.
